title: A Doctor Offers a Home
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on a doctor offers a home, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: A Doctor Offers a Home. Hiriluk reaches out to Chopper and gives him a place to belong, while Drum Kingdom’s cruelty remains in the background. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Hmm!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: 'What a girl...! when'rulers of various king.coms gather!Here at the:reverie, the 'slightest_quarre's could potentially trigger armed conflict...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Did she knowingly apologize because of that...? If so, she must be exceptionally keen to the way of politics...

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Hmph! Annoying little brat... Dalton, we're heading back!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: My app- log- ies.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: WAAAA- Ahh,

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: "You were most admirable, Princess...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: A 10 year old Alabasta girl already thinks of her country before herself...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Oh please, merely thinking of one's country is completely different from ruling it! Open your eyes, dalton!

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: Such trivial emotions are not what's necessary in running a kingdom!

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: That's right. The important thing's the system itself! Now have a drink already.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Both you and I are outcasts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've both endured our fair share of hardship for being the nails that stick out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But don't resent humans for that, Chopper.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: This kingdom is "sick" presently.

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: the king, the government, and even its people...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: their hearts are all ill...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: 'They say there's no cure for a sick kingdom but I beg to differ...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Listen to me, Chopper.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Once upon a time, there was a thief from a certain kingdom in the Far West,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And he was diagnosed with a grave heart disease...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Luckily for him, he had all the money in the world to be treated by the finest doctors in the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But none could cure the man's disease. They all gave up, calling it incurable.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Frustrated that he could do nothing but await his final moment, the man decided to climb a certain mountain.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It was then he witnessed a most phenomenal sight that halted his very breath for a moment. Can you guess what he saw...?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Cherry Blossoms!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: A mountain full of the prettiest cherry blossoms he ever saw!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And to his surprise, the next time he visited a doctor, he was told thus:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: "Your body is completely healthy."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He was healed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It was a miracle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It HAD to be a miracle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Or was it!? Could there be a medically sound explanation? Could it be that the man's sheer astonishment had triggered some natural mechanism of his body?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That must have been what cured the supposedly incurable disease! Amazing, isn't it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: In other words, there are NO incurable diseases in this world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So no matter what anyone says, I'll cure this kingdom even if it's the last thing I do!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Stomp!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Thus, I shall tout this flag of skull and crossbones in the face of every disease that exists in this world!

summary: This part highlights a doctor offers a home and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
